content: File validation in browser: check File.type for MIME (client-side, not authoritative - can be empty on some OS/browsers), File.size for bytes, File.name for extension. Human-readable file size formatter: formatBytes(bytes, decimals=2) using Math.floor(Math.log(bytes)/Math.log(1024)) and ['Bytes','KB','MB','GB'] array. Server-side magic-byte validation via file-type npm package is the authoritative check (per photo-upload-security skill). Client-side MIME checking is UX convenience only.
